body:
APPROVE
Clean Stage 2 migration: dispatch site at cli/cmd/agent_cmd.go:236 now goes through `config.LoadAndResolve` + `QuorumRuntime` + `RunQuorumWithConfigViaService`; durable knobs (Model/Effort/Timeout/Permissions) flow through `ResolvedConfig`, and `QuorumRuntime` embeds `AgentRunRuntime` per SD-024. New behavioral test seeds a virtual harness through the full CLI dispatch path.
artifact: .ddx/executions/20260425T173044-8c291cef/reviewer-stream.log

success
Clean Stage 2 migration: dispatch site at cli/cmd/agent_cmd.go:236 now goes through `config.LoadAndResolve` + `QuorumRuntime` + `RunQuorumWithConfigViaService`; durable knobs (Model/Effort/Timeout/Permissions) flow through `ResolvedConfig`, and `QuorumRuntime` embeds `AgentRunRuntime` per SD-024. New behavioral test seeds a virtual harness through the full CLI dispatch path.
Minor nit (non-blocking): the dispatch site swallows the `LoadAndResolve` error with `rcfg, _ := ...` at agent_cmd.go — worth surfacing in a follow-up bead if Stages 3/4 don't already standardize this.
